title: Iron Carrots
description: A high quality mod that adds different tiers of carrots. (Ex:- Iron Carrot, Diamond Carrot).
body:
-Iron Carrots mod adds **different tiers of carrots** that give more hunger and saturation as the tiers go up.

-You can craft the carrots by **crafting the specific tier you need in a crafting table with the corresponding material**.

-Carrots are **Lapis Carrot, Redstone Carrot, Copper Carrot (Only 1.17+), Iron Carrot, Emerald Carrot, Diamond Carrot, Netherite Carrot (Only 1.16+)**

-**More Carrots** are coming soon, and the mod will be **ported to newer versions**.

-Check out the recipes in the gallery, or alternatively at [Iron Carrots CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/iron-carrots),

-Report any bugs in the CurseForge comment section.

-Only known bugs as of now:
*On some versions, lapis nugget crafting recipe crafts a blue dye instead of nuggets

-Fix: Put one dirt block with the lapis in the crafting grid (1.21.10+, fixing in later versions soon)
